body_txt: If a series — especially a Western series, as opposed to a Japanese one — includes a Pokémon parody , certain elements are almost guaranteed to pop up:  As the last few points should indicate, this trope has evolved (pun unintended) ever since Pokémon proved to be far more enduring than it was initially thought to be. Most parodies nowadays come from its Popularity Polynomial -inducing Periphery Demographic , and are as such far more affectionate . The classic version of this trope, which typically dismissed Pokémon and others like it as a bizarre and ultimately insipid fad, is on its way out . Contrast All Anime Is Naughty Tentacles , which is the other way anime is usually depicted in Western media, though some overlap is possible. Compare Sailor Senshi Send-Up .
